mapper.select: SELECT * FROM exam_record ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT * FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = #{examId} ORDER BY submit_time DESC
SELECT * FROM exam_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT * FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = #{examId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT AVG(total_score) FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status = 1
SELECT MAX(total_score) FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status = 1
SELECT MIN(total_score) FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_record (exam_id, student_id, start_time, submit_time, total_score, objective_score, subjective_score, status, screen_switch_count, ip_address) VALUES (#{examId}, #{studentId}, #{startTime}, #{submitTime}, #{totalScore}, #{objectiveScore}, #{subjectiveScore}, #{status}, #{screenSwitchCount}, #{ipAddress})
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_record SET exam_id = #{examId}, student_id = #{studentId}, start_time = #{startTime}, submit_time = #{submitTime}, total_score = #{totalScore}, objective_score = #{objectiveScore}, subjective_score = #{subjectiveScore}, status = #{status}, screen_switch_count = #{screenSwitchCount}, ip_address = #{ipAddress} WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
